sources.name: User-provided local LUT import
sources.notes: Manual imports are analyzed from a temporary copy and the temporary original is deleted after extraction.

sources.name: abpy/FujifilmCameraProfiles
sources.notes: Community Fujifilm film simulation LUTs. sRGB variants are ingested to avoid DisplayP3 duplicates.

sources.name: shenmintao/V-Log-Alchemy
sources.notes: Pre-generated 33-point .cube LUTs for Panasonic V-Log/V-Gamut input.

sources.name: OpenShot built-in Rec.709 LUTs
sources.notes: OpenShot built-in popular Rec.709 LUTs, grouped by cinematic, moody, vintage, teal-orange, utility, and vibrant categories.

sources.name: Q-DDL 856 free LUTs via Photoshoplus mirror
sources.notes: Q-DDL free LUT packs documented as original .cube files under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0; QuickDDL is offline, Photoshoplus mirrors the original zip packs.

sources.name: Panasonic LUMIX Creator's LUT
sources.notes: Official Panasonic LUMIX Creator's LUT zip downloads for V-Log / V-Log to Rec709 workflows.

sources.name: Panasonic VariCam LUT Library
sources.notes: Official Panasonic VariCam 33-point E-E .cube LUT library for post color grading.

sources.name: Nick Driftwood free LUMIX / V-Log LUTs
sources.notes: Free creator LUT packs for LUMIX V-Log / Real Time LUT workflows, published by Nick Driftwood.
